title: Preliminary audit flags discrepancies in accounts of Kochi Corporation’s Samridhi eatery; Indira Canteen pilot to open shortly
summary: Kochi Corporation Mayor refrains from disclosing specifics citing that the audit was yet to be completed and adds that the audited report will be placed before the council for approval

title: Conflict in West Asia hits Umrah pilgrims from Tiruchi district
summary: Demand for Umrah bookings is high during the month of Ramzan (which began on February 19, 2026), with prices of 15-day pilgrimage packages ranging from ₹75,000 to ₹2 lakh per person

title: Amit Shah unveils mascots, soft launches four digital tools to power Census 2027
summary: The mascots — 'Pragati' (female) and 'Vikas' (male) —  symbolise equal participation of women and men in fulfilling the resolve to make India a developed nation by 2047, a govt. statement said

title: Baramati plane crash: Maharashtra CID questions VSR Ventures owner
summary: NCP (SP) MLA Rohit Pawar had alleged on March 4 that someone was trying to save VSR Ventures, and claimed that a preliminary probe by the AAIB vindicated the doubts earlier raised by him

title: MV Tax Amendment Bill passed for imposing 10% road safety cess
Government investing ₹6,000 crore in substations to meet future power demand in Andhra: Minister Gottipati
summary: The Minister said specifically in Vizianagaram district, two 220 kV power projects worth about ₹46 crore were presently under implementation

title: Revenue Department staff strike hits students, farmers: Anbumani
summary: In a statement, he said around 42,000 officials and staff of the Revenue Department had been on strike since February 24, and that the government had not taken steps to resolve the issue
